common.tagline: Personalized AI Researcher — accumulating domain knowledge in your field. Ask anything, get sourced answers.

landing.subtitle: Your personal AI Researcher, accumulating domain knowledge in your field. Ask anything, get sourced answers — preserved even 10 years later.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Personalized knowledge management system designed to optimize your research workflow.
landing.step1Desc: Create a Knowledge Base customized for your domain — Engineering, Business, Design, or custom.
landing.step2Desc: Paste text, insert URLs, or upload files. The system automatically compiles structured Wiki items.
landing.step3Desc: Ask questions and receive sourced answers with citations and confidence levels directly from your KB.
landing.queryMockupSearch: How to deploy microservices for an e-commerce system?
landing.queryMockupResponse: Based on 12 documents in the Engineering domain, deploying microservices for e-commerce should start with...
landing.featuresSub: Everything you need for personal knowledge
landing.featuresSubDesc: From ingest sources to sourced AI Q&A — all in a single platform.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to build your knowledge base?
landing.ctaDesc: Start for free — no credit card required. Create your first Role KB in 2 minutes.
landing.feature1Desc: Each user creates a private KB customized for their domain. Domain-organized, secure, private.
landing.feature2Desc: Grounded answers with citations, confidence levels, and KB gap detection. Never hallucinating.
landing.feature3Desc: Text, URL, files → structured Wiki items with automatic titles, summaries, tags, and citation-ready chunks.
landing.feature4Desc: Browse, search, and filter knowledge items. Each item has core concepts, citations, and personal notes.
landing.feature5Desc: When the KB lacks evidence, the system identifies gaps and triggers research flows automatically.
landing.feature6Desc: An expert tailored to your domain delivering deep insights, not a generic chatbot.

brand.subtitle: Your personal AI Researcher, accumulating domain knowledge in your field. Ask anything, get sourced answers — preserved even 10 years later.
brand.prop1Desc: Private KB for your domain, never shared
brand.prop2Title: Auto Research when KB is lacking
brand.prop2Desc: No waiting — system auto-ingests as needed

onboarding.title: What is your field of expertise?
onboarding.subtitle: Choose your professional role to configure the most suitable AI Knowledge Base and research methodology.

errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Unauthorized. Please log in to continue.

errors.ROLE_REQUIRED: Select a role for Pulse to create your first Knowledge Base.
errors.PLAN_LIMIT_REACHED: Free plan supports 1 Role KB. Upgrade to Pro to add more roles.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_SOURCE_TYPE: This source type is not supported yet.
errors.FILE_TOO_LARGE: File size exceeds current plan limit. Free max 10 MB, Pro max 25 MB.

errors.RATE_LIMITED: You are operating too fast. Please try again in a few minutes.

welcome.title: Welcome to Pulse Knowledge
welcome.tagline: Domain-specific deep knowledge accumulation — AI never forgets.
welcome.desc: Unlike general chatbots, Pulse Knowledge stores and accumulates specialized knowledge, automatically researches when missing, and never forgets your information.
welcome.feat1Desc: Personal KB + shared Role KB synchronized across your entire team.
welcome.feat2Desc: Automatically searches the Internet when KB lacks info or data is outdated.
welcome.feat3Desc: Deep domain expert advisor tailored to your specialized field.

pickRole.title: What is your field of expertise?
pickRole.subtitle: Pulse Knowledge will automatically configure the Knowledge Base, System Prompt, and data classification filters optimized for your exact industry.
pickRole.freeLimit: Free Plan: Supports 1 job position (Role KB).
pickRole.proLimit: Pro Plan: Supports configuring up to 5 Role KBs.
pickRole.proNudge: Want to add multiple roles? E.g., Frontend + DevOps. Free plan only supports 1.
pickRole.customLimit: Pro plan supports up to 5 Role KBs in initial setup.
pickRole.customLengthError: Role must be between 2 and 80 characters.

seed.title: Start with your first knowledge document
seed.subtitle: Enter a public article link or paste raw text. The system will automatically extract and ingest it into your personal knowledge base.
seed.optional: Optional. You can skip this step and add documents later in the Dashboard.
seed.compileError: Failed to compile this source. You can retry or add another source later.
seed.timeoutWarning: ⚠️ Processing is taking longer than expected. You can head to the Dashboard to track it later.
seed.dragDrop: Drag & drop document files here to auto-analyze
seed.placeholderText: Paste or enter technical documents, notes, guidelines here...
seed.limitTextMin: Content must be at least 50 characters to analyze.
seed.limitUrl: Invalid link. Please enter a URL starting with http:// or https://.

proModal.title: Upgrade to Pro Plan
proModal.subtitle: Unlock multi-role support, increase storage limit and AI query quotas.
proModal.proFeature1: Up to 5 Role KBs in Onboarding MVP
proModal.noticeText: Pro Plan will support configuring up to 5 job positions (Role KBs) simultaneously during this initial setup step.

welcome.subtitle: The system is ready to support your research and professional knowledge accumulation.

query.title: Ask AI
query.subtitle: Grounded Q&A directly from your Knowledge Base
query.placeholder: Type your question here (AI answers based on your documents)...

suggested: Explain the main concepts in your field...
Compare two common methods in your KB...
Summarize the process according to ingested documents...

query.gapDesc: AI did not find enough evidence in the Knowledge Base to answer this question. Try ingesting more related documents.
query.sourceSummary: Synthesized from {count} knowledge items in Knowledge Base
query.startDesc: Ask questions based on your Knowledge Base. AI will provide answers with transparent citations from ingested documents.
query.emptyKbDesc: You need to ingest at least one document into your Knowledge Base before using AI Q&A.
query.limitDesc: You have used up your daily AI Q&A quota. Upgrade to Pro for more queries.
query.createSessionError: Cannot create Q&A session. Please try again.
query.askQuestionError: Cannot process question. Please try again.

labels.headerDesc: Extract knowledge from text or websites into a structured Wiki item.
labels.step1Desc: Choose the source format you want to ingest into the Knowledge Base.
labels.sourceTextDesc: Paste your text, notes, articles, or documents here.
labels.sourceUrlDesc: Crawl content from a website, blog post, or online document.
labels.sourceFileDesc: PDF, TXT, Markdown — exclusive feature for Pro plan.
labels.step2DescText: Paste or enter the text you want to analyze.
labels.step2DescUrl: Enter the website URL to extract content.
labels.labelTextPlaceholder: Paste text, articles, documents, notes... here. Minimum 100 characters.
